title: Crater
description: Open-source, self-hosted web and mobile app to track expenses, payments and create professional invoices and estimates.
installation: Crater is a Laravel (PHP) + Vue invoicing app backed by MariaDB. This template runs the maintained community image ghcr.io/jee-r/crater (nginx + PHP-FPM on :8080), since the upstream project ships a build-from-source docker-compose rather than an official prebuilt image. BEFORE first boot ROTATE: APP_KEY (run `openssl rand -base64 32` and prefix with `base64:`, i.e. set APP_KEY=base64:<value>) and the MariaDB password (default 'crater'). APP_URL is pre-filled with {{KUBERO_APP_URL}} and MUST match the public URL or cookie-based auth (4.0.0+) will fail. FIRST RUN: browse to the app URL and complete the on-boarding wizard (admin account, company, currency); the wizard runs DB migrations automatically. Persistent app data (uploads, generated PDF invoices, logo, storage/) lives under /app and is kept on the mounted volume. Cache/queue/session default to the database and file drivers (no Redis required); SMTP for mail and optional S3 for storage are configured later via env vars or the Settings UI.
